mapper.select:
SELECT id, se_compressor_equip_code, se_compressor_name, se_compressor_type, se_compressor_spec, se_compressor_rated_flow, se_compressor_rated_pressure, se_compressor_rated_power, se_compressor_rated_speed, se_compressor_media, se_compressor_inlet_temp, se_compressor_outlet_temp, se_compressor_design_p, se_compressor_material, se_compressor_explosion_proof, se_compressor_motor_model, se_compressor_lubrication, se_compressor_cooling_type, se_compressor_install_pos, se_compressor_in_service, se_compressor_inspect_cycle, se_compressor_last_inspect, se_compressor_next_inspect, se_compressor_inspect_result, se_compressor_last_maintain, se_compressor_next_maintain, se_compressor_vibration, se_compressor_pressure_ratio, se_compressor_maintain_record, se_compressor_fault_record, se_compressor_operator, se_compressor_create_time, se_compressor_update_time, se_compressor_status, se_compressor_factory, se_compressor_reserve1, se_compressor_reserve2, se_compressor_reserve3 FROM se_compressor
and se_compressor_equip_code like CONCAT( #{queryParams.seCompressorEquipCode}, '%')
and se_compressor_name = #{queryParams.seCompressorName}
and se_compressor_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seCompressorStatus}, '%')
and se_compressor_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seCompressorFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, se_compressor_equip_code, se_compressor_name, se_compressor_type, se_compressor_spec, se_compressor_rated_flow, se_compressor_rated_pressure, se_compressor_rated_power, se_compressor_rated_speed, se_compressor_media, se_compressor_inlet_temp, se_compressor_outlet_temp, se_compressor_design_p, se_compressor_material, se_compressor_explosion_proof, se_compressor_motor_model, se_compressor_lubrication, se_compressor_cooling_type, se_compressor_install_pos, se_compressor_in_service, se_compressor_inspect_cycle, se_compressor_last_inspect, se_compressor_next_inspect, se_compressor_inspect_result, se_compressor_last_maintain, se_compressor_next_maintain, se_compressor_vibration, se_compressor_pressure_ratio, se_compressor_maintain_record, se_compressor_fault_record, se_compressor_operator, se_compressor_create_time, se_compressor_update_time, se_compressor_status, se_compressor_factory, se_compressor_reserve1, se_compressor_reserve2, se_compressor_reserve3 FROM se_compressor
and se_compressor_equip_code like CONCAT( #{seCompressorEquipCode}, '%')
and se_compressor_name = #{queryParams.seCompressorName}
and se_compressor_status like CONCAT ('%',#{seCompressorStatus}, '%')
and se_compressor_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{seCompressorFactory}, '%')
